routing_notes.smooth: 26-week level + linear trend (upgraded from 8-week flat mean)
routing_notes.erratic: seasonal x YoY growth clip [0.3, 5.0] (loosened from [0.5, 3.0])
routing_notes.lumpy: trend_seasonal replaces seasonal_naive — burst demand needs growth component
routing_notes.intermittent: trend_seasonal replaces seasonal_naive — captures inter-arrival trend
routing_notes.cold_start: trend_seasonal mean fallback for short-history SKUs — replaces near-zero naive
